---
species: "Verrucaria sp."
accepted_code: "VERR"
alternate_codes: # "fungi_encrusting_VERR"
diminutive: 
alternate_diminutives: 
common_name: ""
field_id_possible:
  - yes
description: "pale grey, black, or brown crust" 
image: '/header_images/Verrucaria sp..jpg'
image_credit: 'David Nicholls; Barlestone Church; 01 February 2022;' 
categories:
  - fungi
sampling_programs:
    - bhi_quadrat
    - bhi_rov
    - bhi_bruv
    - bhi_farms
    - lsw_quad
    - lsw_microquad
habitat:
  - intertidal
mobility:
  - sessile
sampling_region:
  - GOM
  - Virginian
catami_code: 
catami_version: "1.4"
worms_code: 147701
---


**Other images:** <!-- Other images with attribution -->
<br/>

**Distinguishing features:** 
<!-- size, gross morphology, a key identifier, zonation notes (intertidal or depth) -->
<br/>

**Easily confused species and differentiation:** 

<br/>

**Extended Description:** <!-- Extended description -->

[WORMS page](https://www.marinespecies.org/aphia.php?p=taxdetails&id=147701#sources)
